children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: As part of the clean coal power initiative, the Secretary shall award competitive, merit-based grants to institutions of higher education for the establishment of centers of excellence for energy systems of the future.

children.heading: Basis for grants
children.label: b Basis for grants
children.text: The Secretary shall award grants under this section to institutions of higher education that show the greatest potential for advancing new clean coal technologies.
